$meta.description: Component inventory for CraftKeeper. Each entry lists the variants and states realized in the HTML mockups, plus the tokens they consume. Styling is inline in the mockups (no CSS classes); names below are the intended engineering component names.
principles: Powerful without feeling dangerous — actions state what happens, what changes, reversibility, restart need, risks.
Progressive disclosure — readable defaults; raw files/paths/diffs available.
Configuration is a first-class product, not a file browser.
AI proposes; the administrator decides (v1: no autonomous file/command changes).
Operational state is honest and specific.

components.name: Button
components.notes: Destructive is always visually distinct (danger-tinted bg + danger text/border). Loading shows a spinner.

components.name: Input / Field
components.notes: Fields pair a label + help text; error state connects the message to the field (danger label, border, and inline message with a shape marker).

components.name: StatusBadge
components.purpose: Honest operational state — never collapse 'pending restart' into 'saved'.
components.encoding: color + a distinct shape glyph (square, triangle=restart, circle=reload, ring=scheduled, spinner=in-progress) + label. Never color-only.

components.name: ProvenanceBadge
components.purpose: Show the source of information or an action.

components.name: CompatibilityIndicator
components.notes: Concrete signals only — no invented unified 'trust score'.

components.name: RiskLevel
components.encoding: left color bar + label + example; friction scales with level (critical => type-to-confirm).

components.name: ValidationMessage
components.notes: Inline, connected to field or file; consequence-first copy.

components.name: PlayerIdentityMarker
components.encoding: Java vs Bedrock/Floodgate platform chip + online square; Floodgate prefix shown.
components.caution: Whitelist status must not imply 'trusted' when enforcement is disabled — explicit disclaimer shown.

components.name: DiffViewer
components.responsive: side-by-side collapses to unified on narrow screens

components.name: GuidedConfigField
components.notes: Inferred/generic fields must be labeled as such — never presented as officially documented.

components.name: Console
components.caution: Visually distinct from a Linux shell. Dangerous commands open review, not immediate execution.

components.name: CommandComposer (AI)
components.rule: AI-generated commands never look indistinguishable from already-executed ones.

components.name: AIAnswer
components.citations: link to exact config / log selection / plugin record / approved docs

components.name: RedactionDisclosure
components.notes: Shown before sending context to a hosted provider.

components.name: Notice / Alert
components.notes: Persistent notices use consequence-first copy (e.g. 'Saved, but Paper must restart before it becomes active').

tiers.low: direct action or simple confirm, undo where possible
tiers.critical: type the target name / action phrase (exceptional)

components.name: DataTable
components.responsive: collapses to stacked cards on mobile
components.notes: Meaningful headers; drill-in row -> detail drawer.

components.name: PageState
components.notes: Unavailable telemetry is labeled honestly (e.g. CPU 'not reported'), never simulated.

components.name: AppShell
parts: sidebar (mark, server identity, live health, player count, primary nav, admin menu)
top bar (command palette ⌘K, pending-restart indicator, notifications, AI trigger, theme toggle)
components.notes: Persistent desktop shell; collapses to drawer + bottom tab bar on mobile.

components.name: CommandPalette
components.rule: Dangerous actions do not execute from search — they open their review/confirmation interface.
